name: Suspicious Access to lsass Process
notes: This rule triggers when a suspicious access to lsass is detected.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Processes Allowed to Access lsass

dependencies.name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Processes Allowed to Access lsass

conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Processes Allowed to Access lsass
when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' and "Granted Access" IMATCHES '(0x1010)|(0x1410)|(0x143A)' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Access to lsass Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Processes Allowed to Access lsass
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001829) ProcessAccess
AND when the event matches "Target Process Name" IMATCHES 'lsass\.exe' and "Granted Access" IMATCHES '(0x1010)|(0x1410)|(0x143A)' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process
Event description: Detected a Malicious Access to lsass Process
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
